mapper.sql: select draft_id, record_id, session_id, session_paper_id, question_id, user_id, user_answer, save_count, last_save_time, status from sc_exam_answer_draft
mapper.insert: insert into sc_exam_answer_draft(record_id, session_id, session_paper_id, question_id, user_id, user_answer, save_count, last_save_time, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{recordId}, #{sessionId}, #{sessionPaperId}, #{questionId}, #{userId}, #{userAnswer}, #{saveCount}, #{lastSaveTime}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
